items_flat.title_zh: Unsloth 發布更高速的 Qwen3.6 量化版本
items_flat.summary_en: The new Qwen3.6 quantizations target 24 GB GPUs and report substantial throughput gains while preserving tool-use and agent behavior.
items_flat.summary_zh: 新版 Qwen3.6 量化模型瞄準 24GB GPU，宣稱大幅提高吞吐量，同時保留工具使用與代理行為。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI resets usage limits during the GPT-5.6 launch window
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 在 GPT-5.6 上市期間重置用量限制
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI reset ChatGPT Work and Codex limits during the launch window to give users more room to test ambitious GPT-5.6 Sol workflows.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 在上市期間重置 ChatGPT Work 與 Codex 用量，讓使用者有更多空間測試 GPT-5.6 Sol 的大型工作流程。

openai.title_zh: OpenAI 在 GPT-5.6 上市期間重置用量限制
openai.summary_en: OpenAI reset ChatGPT Work and Codex limits during the launch window to give users more room to test ambitious GPT-5.6 Sol workflows.
